---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Apico
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case
Describe the use case or problem this feature would solve. Why would this be useful?

## Example
Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used:

```
Example usage here...
```

## Alternatives
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Is this related to a problem?
Link to any related issues.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This feature doesn't duplicate existing functionality
- [ ] I have clearly described the use case
